rationale: In the citing paper, Che, Sudhir, and Seetharaman (2007) appears only as part of a grouped citation when the authors note that treating unobserved transition times as latent variables is analogous to the endogenous-initial-conditions issue in state-dependence models. The citation is used as general methodological background alongside other references, without a distinct discussion of that paper's pricing framework, findings, or specific procedures. The citing paper's core model and contribution are developed around last-move hazard modeling for durable-goods loyalty rather than building directly on the cited paper.
